brain_consensus.narrative: The market is trapped in a fear-driven liquidity vacuum, with the Fear & Greed Index plumbing depths not seen since the August 2024 bottom while stablecoin reserves quietly swell on the sidelines. This is the same playbook that marked the last major accumulation zone, where sidelined capital eventually forced a violent mean reversion as bears ran out of sellers. The silence before the storm is deafening.
brain_consensus.headline: Dry Powder Builds as Fear Grips the Bid

next_move.reasoning: Despite the 78.6% match to August 2024 bottom, critical divergences scream caution: ETF flows at 100 vs 55, VIX at 65 vs 38, and BTC dominance fading 25 points higher all indicate this is NOT a true bottom analog but rather a mid-cycle chop zone; my 0% track record on direction calls demands humility when factors conflict this sharply.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 and funding collapses to sub-35 with VIX spiking above 75 would confirm we're actually approaching a true bottom phase shift down to Panic
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC breaks above $70k with funding sustaining above 55 and fear_greed climbing above 40 would invalidate the chop thesis and signal move to Complacency

narrative.headline: Dry Powder Builds as Fear Grips the Bid

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests a spring-loaded recovery as sidelined stablecoins rotate back in, mirroring the August 2024 bottom structure.

next_move.reasoning: With VIX elevated and ETF flows diverging sharply from the bottom analog, the market needs confirmation either way—fear dropping below 25 with VIX spiking above 75 would confirm a flush to Panic, while BTC breaking $70k with sustained funding above 55 would signal recovery to Complacency.
next_move.brains_agree: No—analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing conflicting factors; narrative implies accumulation entry with high confidence, a material split on both direction and conviction
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 and funding collapses to sub-35 with VIX spiking above 75 (confirming shift down to Panic) OR BTC breaks above $70k with funding sustaining above 55 and fear_greed climbing above 40 (confirming shift up to Complacency)
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed stabilizes in current band with VIX normalizing below 50 and ETF flows remaining elevated, keeping the market locked in Anxiety chop with no directional resolution
